lastReleaseMessage: v0.58.11 - remove all building texture_scale resizing (21 files to native 1.0); fixes tiny lantern (was 0.099). Whole scene now true 1:1, zero in-code resize

barRaise.topFinding: The verdict holds at healthy for the second straight cycle. Two doc and script-only patches shipped clean since 06-14: v0.58.2 (847f6a8) reconciled the v0.58.0/v0.58.1 version smear that 06-14 flagged, and v0.58.3 (6701544) landed the ARCHITECTURE.md delta refresh; HEAD is pushed, the working tree is clean, nothing is stranded. The story is recurrence, not regression. The version-pill-vs-changelog class that 06-14 closed reappeared one cycle later: v0.58.2 and v0.58.3 bumped the GDD meta-pill to v0.58.3 without authoring matching footer entries, so the changelog footer now trails its own pill by two patches and the published mirror shows a pill two ahead of its newest changelog line. The five scripts/*.ps1.bak files are now tracked for a fourth consecutive review. The single highest-leverage move is not itself high severity: teach release.ps1 to refuse a pill bump with no matching footer entry, which converts this whole recurring class into a hard preship gate instead of a weekly audit finding.
